problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bacteriophage. Bacteriophage surface display for targeting directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
